pass1_value.note: Official developer docs list OAuth 2.0, API token (used like an API key), and basic auth (email/password or email/token). Support article details API token usage and basic auth variant.

final_value.note: Zendesk's official Ticketing API docs list authentication options including OAuth 2.0, API tokens (used in requests like an API key), and basic authentication (including the email/token pattern).

pass1_value.note: Generating an API token requires an admin to create it in Admin Center; tokens are not obtainable by a developer without admin privileges. OAuth app creation and admin-level settings likewise require account/admin setup.

final_value.note: Zendesk's official support article instructs admins to generate API tokens in Admin Center (Apps and integrations -> APIs -> Zendesk API -> Add API token), indicating token creation requires admin-level access/approval.
